name: Feature Request

labels: enhancement

---

## Problem Statement
Describe the problem or use case you're trying to solve.

**Example:** "As a [user role], I want to [action] so that [benefit]"

## Proposed Solution
Describe how you'd like this feature to work.

## Alternatives Considered
List any alternative solutions or features you've considered.

## Examples
Provide any relevant examples or mock-ups.

## Is this feature aligned with ParcInfo scope?
- [ ] Yes - IT asset management related
- [ ] No - Out of scope
- [ ] Unsure

## Additional Context
Add any other context, research, or background information here.

## References
- Related issues: #123
- External references: [links]
